title: AES-128 for real-time event streaming
description: Real-time event streaming uses AES-128-GCM for message encryption due to latency requirements. Events contain only Internal-classified data (system metrics and aggregate counts). No PII or Confidential data in event stream.
compensating_controls: Data is Internal classification only; Kafka cluster is VPC-internal with mTLS between brokers; events are ephemeral (24-hour retention); no PII in event payloads verified by monthly audit; streaming consumer access restricted to analytics service role
review_outcome: Not renewed - migrated to AES-256 with optimized implementation

title: Legacy notification service key rotation deferral
description: Deferral of APP-006 key rotation originally due October 2024. The notification service requires refactoring to support dual-key reads before key rotation can proceed. Engineering bandwidth allocated for Q2 2025.
compensating_controls: Enhanced monitoring on notification service key usage; monthly access review of key consumers; key has not been exposed or compromised; service scheduled for architecture upgrade in Q2 2025
review_outcome: Expired without renewal. Remediation not completed. No follow-up exception filed.

title: Extended PGP key validity for Meridian Financial
description: Meridian Financial PGP key exchange cycle is 24 months instead of annual due to partner's security review process requiring 90-day lead time. Current key valid through January 2026.
compensating_controls: Monthly verification of PGP key integrity; partner access restricted to dedicated SFTP endpoint; all transferred files are also encrypted in transit via SFTP; file-level integrity checks (SHA-256 checksums); quarterly partner security review call
review_outcome: Active - key exchange coordination in progress for January 2026
